allow: PowerShell($pf = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/portfolios/default"; $tx = $pf.transactions | Where-Object { $_.symbol -eq "YESBANK.NS" -and $_.qty -eq 10 -and $_.price -eq 20.54 }; if \($tx\) { Invoke-RestMethod -Method Delete "http://localhost:3210/api/portfolios/default/transactions/$\($tx.id\)" | Out-Null; "removed test tx $\($tx.id\)" } else { "no test tx found" })

PowerShell(foreach \($s in @\("RELIANCE.NS","YESBANK.NS","UNITECH.NS","SWIGGY.NS"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/research/$s"; "$s -> OK score=$\($r.scores.composite\) verdict=$\($r.verdict\) pb=$\($r.fundamentals.pb\)" } catch { "$s -> FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($f = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/financials/RELIANCE.NS"; "annual rows: $\($f.annual.Count\), quarterly rows: $\($f.quarterly.Count\)"; $f.annual | Select-Object date, revenue, netIncome, eps, netMargin | Format-Table; $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/research/TCS.NS"; "TCS research OK: score=$\($r.scores.composite\), fairValue=$\($r.valuation.fairValue\), revCAGR=$\($r.statements.revenueCagr3y\)"; $h = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/history/RELIANCE.NS?range=1y"; "history source: $\($h.source\), candles: $\($h.candles.Count\)")

PowerShell(Start-Process netsh -ArgumentList 'advfirewall firewall add rule name="StockDesk 3210" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=3210' -Verb RunAs -Wait; netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name="StockDesk 3210")

PowerShell(foreach \($q in @\("TMCV", "Tata Teleservices", "Generic Pharmasec", "Tata Motors"\)\) { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/search?q=$\([uri]::EscapeDataString\($q\)\)"; "--- $q"; $r | Select-Object -First 4 symbol, name, exchange | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders | Out-String })

PowerShell($q = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/quotes?symbols=YESBANK.NS"; "source: $\($q.'YESBANK.NS'.source\), price: $\($q.'YESBANK.NS'.price\)"; $pf = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/portfolios/all"; "net worth: ₹$\([math]::Round\($pf.summary.current\)\), day P&L: ₹$\([math]::Round\($pf.summary.dayPnl\)\)")

PowerShell($t1 = Measure-Command { $pf1 = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/portfolios/all" }; $t2 = Measure-Command { $pf2 = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/portfolios/all" }; $q = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/quotes?symbols=RELIANCE.NS"; "cold load: $\([math]::Round\($t1.TotalMilliseconds\)\) ms | cached load: $\([math]::Round\($t2.TotalMilliseconds\)\) ms | quote source: $\($q.'RELIANCE.NS'.source\) | kite status: $\(\(Invoke-RestMethod 'http://localhost:3210/api/kite/status'\).connected\)")
PowerShell("hostname: $env:COMPUTERNAME"; Get-Service -Name Dnscache | Select-Object Status; Get-NetAdapter -Physical | Where-Object Status -eq 'Up' | Select-Object Name, MacAddress)

PowerShell($f = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/financials/WELSPLSOL.NS"; "annual: $\($f.annual.Count\) rows, quarterly: $\($f.quarterly.Count\) rows"; $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3210/api/research/WELSPLSOL.NS"; "research fundamentalsAvailable: $\($r.fundamentalsAvailable\); fund pe=$\($r.fundamentals.pe\) roe=$\($r.fundamentals.roe\) margin=$\($r.fundamentals.profitMargin\) revGrowth=$\($r.fundamentals.revenueGrowth\); valuation: $\($r.valuation.method\)")
